# Avinash (alvs.dev)

Frontend web developer based in India. Comfortable with JavaScript across the stack. Currently building Orbit, a daily budgeting app.

## About

I build focused web projects to learn and solve real problems. Passionate about open source, clean code, and shipping over endless polish.

## Pages

- Sitemap: https://alvs.dev/sitemap - Map of every page on this site.

- Home: https://alvs.dev - Overview of work and current focus
- About: https://alvs.dev/about - Personal philosophy and interests
- Now: https://alvs.dev/now - Current activities and focus
- Connect: https://alvs.dev/connect - Contact info and collaboration inquiries

- Hire me: https://alvs.dev/hire-me - My experience, past projects, and what I'm looking for.
- Projects: https://alvs.dev/projects - Things I've built.
- Lab: https://alvs.dev/lab - A personal playground for curiosity-driven builds.
- Experience: https://alvs.dev/experience - Timeline of my professional journey.

- Notes: https://alvs.dev/notes - Public notes on things I want to share.
- Books: https://alvs.dev/books - What I've read.
- Echoes: https://alvs.dev/echoes - Lines that feel close.

- Music: https://alvs.dev/music - What I've been listening to.
- Movies: https://alvs.dev/movies - Movies I recommend to watch.

- Changelog: https://alvs.dev/changelog - Updates and changes to this site.
- Uses: https://alvs.dev/uses - My gear, tools, and daily software.
- Feeds: https://alvs.dev/feeds - RSS feeds I follow and ways to follow my activity.
- Colophon: https://alvs.dev/colophon - How this site is built.

## Featured Products

- Orbit: Daily budget app, that calculates your safe-to-spend for today - https://www.orbitbudget.com

## Site Meta

Built with Astro, custom minimal CSS, deployed on Netlify. Source available at https://github.com/Av1-Lv5/alvs.dev
